title: Delhi HC orders Rakshit Shetty to pay ₹25 lakh for unauthorised use of songs in Bachelor Party
description: Amount includes ₹20 lakh towards licence fee for songs “Nyaya Ellide” and “Omme Ninnanu”, which has already been deposited during the proceedings, and an additional ₹5 lakh imposed as exemplary costs for non-compliance with an earlier court order.
